nasb.text: Ask of Me, and I will surely give the nations as Your inheritance, And the very ends of the earth as Your possession.

esv.text: Ask of me, and I will make the nations your heritage, and the ends of the earth your possession.

cnv.text: 你求我，我就把列國賜給你作產業， 把全地都歸屬於你。

ccb.text: 你向我祈求，我必把列国赐给你作产业， 让天下都归你所有。

csbs.text: 你向我求， 我就赐列国为你的继业， 赐地极为你的产业。
